suggestions.suggestion: Before UI work, require primary_action_snapshot_v1.json to exist and pass QA.
suggestions.reason: Command Center UX degraded when UI was built before the decision layer was resolved.

suggestions.suggestion: Keep full diagnostic context collapsed by default on Operator Home.
suggestions.reason: Operator UX should show only one action first; evidence and internals should be available but secondary.

suggestions.suggestion: Track required-agent utilization per task, not total-agent utilization.
suggestions.reason: Using all agents all the time would create noise and slow execution.
